evals.prompt: We are getting about 1000 views per video but almost no affiliate link clicks. How do we fix the funnel?
evals.expected_output: Identify Awareness-to-Action gap, recommend A/B tests on link placement, check product-niche match, benchmark 2-4% CTR.
expectations: The response identifies the funnel gap as Awareness-to-Action (0% CTR from views)
The response recommends A/B testing link placement (description vs pinned comment)
The response checks product-to-niche match strength
The response benchmarks against a 2-4% affiliate CTR target

evals.prompt: How do we get our first 10 agency clients?
evals.expected_output: Prioritize referrals over cold outreach, design the agency lead loop, use ICE-scored experiments, provide a specific first-month action plan.
expectations: The response prioritizes referrals and warm intros over cold outreach
The response designs a specific agency lead loop (case study to email to call to sign)
The response uses ICE scoring for channel experiments
The response provides a concrete first-month action plan

evals.prompt: Should we focus on growing TikTok or LinkedIn first for Citadel AI brand?
evals.expected_output: Distinguish TikTok (Stream 1, content) vs LinkedIn (Stream 2, agency clients), apply North Star metric for each, explain different funnels.
expectations: The response distinguishes TikTok as Stream 1 vs LinkedIn as Stream 2
The response applies a North Star metric for each platform separately
The response explains these are different funnels not competing choices
The response recommends testing both with ICE scoring
